seoTitle: North Turramurra vs North Wahroonga — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between North Turramurra and North Wahroonga. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: North Turramurra vs North Wahroonga: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in North Turramurra and North Wahroonga.
heading: North Turramurra vs North Wahroonga — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between North Turramurra, New South Wales and North Wahroonga, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: North Wahroonga has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to North Turramurra (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is North Turramurra or North Wahroonga safer from flooding?
faq.answer: North Turramurra has a flood risk score of 58/100, while North Wahroonga scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: North Turramurra scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. North Wahroonga scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in North Turramurra or North Wahroonga?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. North Wahroonga has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
